question_text: Classify each of the following as either a contact force or a non-contact force: (i) the force of a tennis racket hitting a ball, (ii) the gravitational force on a falling object, (iii) the normal force between a book and a shelf.
correct_answer: (i) Contact force (ii) Non-contact force (iii) Contact force
explanation: Contact forces require two objects to be touching, like a racket hitting a ball or a book resting on a shelf. Non-contact forces act from a distance without touching, such as gravity pulling on a falling object.
